hero.desc: Manage your pilgrimage journey securely — access bookings, digital IDs, invoices, and document verification in one unified dashboard.

services.title: Our Services

features.title: Everything you need for a seamless digital pilgrimage
features.desc: The Hoggaan E-Portal connects pilgrims, agents, and administrators through one secure system — for travel, documents, and payments.

features.ctaTitle: Begin your journey with Hoggaan E-Portal
features.ctaDesc: Log in to access your digital tools or verify your booking status now.

about.title: The Hoggaan E-Portal
about.body: The Hoggaan E-Portal is the official internal platform for Hoggaan Travels. It centralizes all digital operations — from booking and pilgrim management to financial records and document verification. Built exclusively for authorized Hoggaan employees and verified users, it ensures security, efficiency, and transparency across every department.

access.title: Verified Staff and Authorized Users Only
access.body: Access to the portal is restricted to authenticated Hoggaan personnel, group coordinators, and assigned administrative users. Every login is protected by secure session management, ensuring that sensitive data such as visas, payments, and bookings remain confidential.

core.title: Connected Tools in One Secure Dashboard
core.body: The system integrates booking, document management, financial tracking, and digital identity verification into a unified workflow. This enables real-time collaboration and automated record keeping.

security.title: Enterprise-Level Protection
security.body: Data is secured through Supabase and Next.js middleware, ensuring that every transaction, file, and session follows strict internal access policies. Continuous audits and encrypted storage protect both staff and pilgrim data.
bullets: Role-based access for admins and employees
Automatic session updates and timeout protection
Encrypted file storage and audit logs

contact.title: Contact the Hoggaan E-Portal Team
contact.intro: Reach out to our digital operations team — we’ll get back to you promptly.

side.title: Need Assistance?
side.subtitle: Technical issues, access requests, or custom portal inquiries — we’re here to help.

form.title: Send us a message
form.name: Full Name
form.disclaimer: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by the Hoggaan E-Portal support team.

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields.

portalFooter.description: The centralized digital backbone of Hoggaan Travels — connecting bookings, finance, and pilgrim operations in one secure platform.

legal.rights: © {year} Hoggaan Travels E-Portal – All Rights Reserved

hero.title: Protection with clarity. Service with integrity.
hero.desc: One page. Two views. Read the essentials in Plain English—or switch to the Legal view for full detail. Either way, you’ll find the same commitments: respect for your privacy, fair terms, and transparent service.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.legal: Safety is prioritized in vendor selection and itinerary planning.

honesty.title: Honesty Always
honesty.plain: No hidden tricks, no vague fine print.
honesty.legal: Pricing and inclusions are stated upfront; VAT (5%) included unless stated otherwise.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.plain: We follow the rules so your trip goes smoothly.
compliance.legal: We act as agent for flights/hotels/visas and comply with provider and consular policies.

respect.title: Respect
respect.plain: Careful, courteous service—start to safe return.
respect.legal: Staff operate under a duty of care and least-privilege data access.

plain.intro: We’re your agent for flights, hotels, and visas. Final approval and availability come from the providers.
bullets: Travelers must be 18+. If younger, a sponsor (guardian) must travel with them and complete all forms.
Passport must be valid at least 6 months from travel date (12+ months recommended).
All prices include 5% VAT unless we explicitly say otherwise.

legal.intro: Hoggaan Travels acts solely as an agent coordinating reservations and visa applications with third-party providers. All bookings are subject to provider rules and capacity; service delivery and approvals remain the provider’s responsibility.
bullets: Age: 18+. Minors require a traveling sponsor/guardian who assumes liability and submits all documentation.
Passport: minimum validity of 6 months post-departure; 12+ months advised.
Pricing: unless itemized otherwise, charges are VAT-inclusive at 5%.

full.title: Full Payment
full.plain: Pay cash or via bank transfer. Booking is confirmed after funds clear.
full.legal: Full settlement via cash or bank transfer; confirmation follows receipt and reconciliation of funds.

install.title: Installments (SomBank & Amal Bank)
install.plain: If eligible, apply with proof of employment, last 6 months’ bank statements, passport (6+ months), photo, and a sponsor (individual or company).
install.legal: Installment eligibility requires: current employment proof, 6-month bank statements, passport validity > 6 months, applicant photo, and a sponsor. If an individual: sponsor’s passport, photo, employment proof, and 6-month bank statements. If a company: valid registration (Shatiga).

plain: Full refund if you cancel before your visa is submitted to the main office or processed.
If your visa was already submitted or issued, we deduct only the visa cost and refund the rest.
legal: For package cancellations prior to visa submission or processing by the main office, Customer is entitled to a full refund.
Where visa has been submitted to the main office or issued, the visa fee becomes non-refundable. Only that amount is deducted; all other recoverable sums are returned.

identity.ex: Full name, nationality, passport number, photo
identity.why: Visa issuance, traveler verification, itinerary display (Hoggaan ID & QR)

contact.share: Service providers if needed for booking confirmation

booking.share: Airlines, hotels (as required to fulfill reservations)

dataMap.note: We do not use your data for marketing or analytics—only to deliver your trip.

contract.title: Contract
contract.plain: We need some data to book your trip and deliver the services you ordered.
contract.legal: Processing necessary to perform a contract or to take steps at your request before entering a contract.

legal.title: Legal Obligation
legal.plain: We obey applicable laws and consular requirements.
legal.legal: Processing to comply with legal duties, immigration/consular requirements, and tax obligations.

legit.title: Legitimate Interests
legit.plain: We keep your journey secure and running smoothly.
legit.legal: Processing for service integrity, fraud prevention, and secure itinerary delivery—balanced against your rights.

consent.title: Consent (specific features)
consent.plain: If a feature needs consent, we’ll ask and you can withdraw anytime.
consent.legal: Where consent is used, it is specific, informed, and revocable without detriment.

idContact.howLong: While trip is active + legally required period

booking.howLong: While service is active + audit window

install.notes: Only shared with SomBank / Amal Bank for financing.

retention.footer: We only keep data for as long as needed for your journey and our legal duties—no extra.

items.title: Least-Privilege Access
items.body: Only trained Hoggaan staff with a genuine need can access your record.

items.title: Defense-in-Depth
items.body: Controls across people, process, and technology to reduce risk.

items.title: Secure Channels
items.body: Data in transit and at rest is protected with industry-standard methods.

cookies.plain: We avoid tracking. If any cookie exists, it’s essential—like sign-in or language preference. No ads, no analytics.
cookies.legal: Only essential cookies (e.g., session, locale) may be used to deliver core functions. No behavioral ads, cross-site tracking, or marketing analytics are performed.

complaints.plain: If something feels off, tell us—we’ll make it right. If you’re not satisfied, you may contact your local data authority.
complaints.legal: Customers may submit complaints to Hoggaan Travels at the contact below. If unresolved, you may escalate to your competent supervisory authority (where applicable).

changes.change: New dual-mode (Plain / Legal) layout, expanded data map, clarified refunds and installments.
Added QR usage clarifications and cookie stance.

hero.title: Core Services & Modules
hero.desc: The E-Portal is a unified platform for Hoggaan employees and verified users — enabling smooth digital operations, bookings, and management of every travel process.

groups.heading: Operations & Management
groups.desc: Core modules designed for booking workflows and pilgrim coordination inside Hoggaan’s ecosystem.

items.title: Booking & Group Management
items.desc: Create, manage, and track pilgrim bookings, flights, and groups in real-time across departments.

items.title: Pilgrim ID & Verification
items.desc: Issue unique digital IDs with QR codes for instant check-in, identification, and data sync.

items.title: Documents & Visa Processing
items.desc: Securely upload, verify, and store required travel and visa documentation for every registered pilgrim.

groups.heading: Accommodation & Logistics
groups.desc: Tools for handling all movement and lodging operations from arrival to departure.

items.title: Hotel & Room Allocation
items.desc: Assign rooms and monitor occupancy seamlessly through hotel dashboards and capacity tracking.

items.title: Transport & Route Scheduling
items.desc: Coordinate transfers between airports, Madinah, and Makkah with route-based time tracking.

items.title: Invoices & Financial Records
items.desc: Generate and review invoices, expenses, and payments automatically with secure audit trails.

groups.heading: Security, Analytics & Support
groups.desc: Advanced layers that keep operations safe, measurable, and connected for Hoggaan’s workforce.

items.title: Role-Based Access Security
items.desc: Granular permissions for employees, managers, and admins to ensure safe access and compliance.

items.title: Analytics & Reports
items.desc: Visual dashboards with live metrics for bookings, occupancy, expenses, and agent performance.

items.title: Integrated Support
items.desc: Built-in helpdesk and staff support tools for internal communication and field assistance.

cta.title: Interested in a Similar E-Portal for Your Organization?
cta.desc: Hoggaan’s in-house development team can customize and deploy a dedicated version of this system for travel agencies, ministries, or enterprise clients.
